hero.art_prompt: Rohan, a 28 year old Indian man in smart-casual, energetic and confident, presenting a bright brand idea on a screen, modern office, creative and aspirational.

panels.narration: Rohan was already good at understanding customers at work.
panels.dialogue: I could always read what customers want.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan, 28, confidently pitching a marketing idea to colleagues, energetic and creative, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from sales into marketing leadership, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Marketing.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Rohan's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Marketing, warm hopeful glow, modern home.

panels.narration: Rohan enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan confidently starting his first brand management lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Marketing
points: Master the real craft: brand management, consumer behaviour, market research and sales strategy.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Rohan Sen
testimonials.quote: I always understood customers. This MBA turned that instinct into real marketing leadership.

testimonials.name: Ananya Iyer
testimonials.quote: Learning brand and consumer strategy made my campaigns actually work.

testimonials.name: Dev Sharma
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me upskill in marketing without pausing my career.

testimonials.name: Priya Menon
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real marketing skills got me a brand leadership role.
